sessions.summary: Tested Create Account and Create Contact actions end-to-end. Create Account works. Create Contact blocked by accountId DataTypeMismatch — Organization Relationship not populating correctly. Also found and fixed multiple ingest issues (country enum, phone format, firstLineName mapping).

Ran LLM Council on idea for intelligent alert triage bot + Grafana improvements. Council validated the idea but recommended: audit 30-day alert volume first, get team lead buy-in, start with one suppression rule (not a bot). Grafana improvements as phase 2.

Designed and implemented iterate.js re-engagement module. LLM Council evaluated architecture (B vs C vs event-driven). Final design: poll review_requested timeline events (5min) + Slack ptal trigger. Per-finding fix validation, dev reply handling, never auto-resolve threads. Spec written, reviewed, implemented.
